official_name: vocadito: solo vocals with f0, note, and lyric annotations
attribution_text: Bittner et al.: 'vocadito' (ISMIR-LBD 2021), CC BY 4.0, Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.5557945
vocal_type: solo singing, ~29 singers, varied training levels, varied consumer devices
allowed_eval_use: device-realism smoke tests; pitch-tracker validation (f0/note/lyric annotations)
notes: Small but the only open set with untrained singers on consumer devices.
